title: arctostaphylos pungens var. ravenii
intro: Arctostaphylos pungens var. ravenii, also known as the Point Reyes manzanita, is a variety of evergreen shrub that belongs to the Ericaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Arctostaphylos pungens var. ravenii include its potential to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used topically in creams and salves for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
